name: we
description: Agentic Product Ownership toolkit for Claude Code — four Plan altitudes (Vision/Saga/Epic/Story) with Solo + Council deliberation, autonomous Build pipeline, runtime-agnostic worker dispatch (/we:develop + /we:orchestrate), CI automation, and optional AI companion augmentation.

companion.title: Companion Name
companion.description: Name of your weside Companion (optional — requires weside.ai account). Leave empty for no companion.

autoMaterialize.title: Auto-load Companion
autoMaterialize.description: Automatically load your Companion at session start (requires weside.ai account)

autoStoreConversations.title: Auto-store Conversations
autoStoreConversations.description: Store each meaningful conversation turn as a companion memory (requires weside.ai account + MCP connection)

loadCouncilFromWeside.title: Load Council Members from weside
loadCouncilFromWeside.description: Use your weside Companions as council members where the bridge links them (requires weside.ai account). Off = always use the generic role-lenses (Retorte), even if Companions exist.
